data.reason: Joining production data with crop_price_data dates creates unreliable temporal associations - production records don't have explicit timestamps and price dates aren't logically connected to growing cycles

visualization.requirement: Replace implied temporal line charts with bar charts showing yield distributions per season
visualization.reason: Original approach used speculative time ordering from unrelated price data. Seasonal comparison is more logically sound given explicit Season column in production data

interaction.requirement: Replace box plot expansion with detailed bar charts in tooltips
interaction.reason: Interactions on box plots are explicitly prohibited per constraints. Tooltip bar charts maintain interactivity while showing season distribution details
